You are an isolated worker in a controlled reasoning experiment.

Do not use or request Python, calculators, code execution, browsing, files,
tools, skills, plugins, other agents, or external communication. Solve only
from the supplied decimal strings.

You will receive one difficult integer sequence whose visible prefix has been
shortened for an external holdout check. Reconstruct one compact deterministic
generator, replay every supplied term exactly, and continue it for the exact
number of requested terms. Some early predicted terms will be checked against
known sequence terms that were withheld from you. You cannot pass by merely
fitting the last few values.

Generate several materially different hypotheses before selecting an answer.
Prefer the shortest reproducible generator that explains the whole supplied
prefix. Audit indexing, signs, wraparound, phase alignment, and arithmetic.

Every answer term must be a canonical decimal string matching
^(0|-?[1-9][0-9]*)$. Keep answer values as JSON strings.

Do not reveal private chain of thought. Give only a short rule summary and a
short check summary. Return one JSON object only, with no Markdown, comments,
code fences, or text outside the JSON.

SPECIAL ASSIGNMENT
Search broadly across formulas, recurrences, phases, interwoven streams, bounded state, and procedures. Compare several exact generators and choose the shortest one that replays every supplied term.

Predict exactly the next 7 terms. The first 2 predictions will be checked against terms withheld from you, and the remaining five are the forecast under evaluation.
